class.name: QueryContext3D
class.brief_description: Acts as a reference for [QueryGenerator3D]s and [QueryTest3D]s, providing [Node3D]s and/or [Vector3]s in an [Array].
class.description: Acts as a reference for [QueryGenerator3D]s and [QueryTest3D]s, providing [Node3D]s and/or [Vector3]s in an [Array].

method.name: _get_context
method.description: Called on [QueryGenerator3D]s and [QueryTest3Ds] to get a list of [Node3Ds] and/or [Vector3]s. [b]Note:[/b] Must be overrwritten.

method.name: get_context
method.description: Called on [QueryGenerator3D]s and [QueryTest3Ds] to get a list of [Node3Ds] and/or [Vector3]s.

method.name: get_context_positions
method.description: Returns only the positions of each context. Used in some [QueryTest3D]s where collisions aren't needed.
